chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ أَبِي ذَرٍّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 385)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 385)
text: حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي رَجُلٌ مِنْ بَنِي نَوْفَلِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْمُطَّلِبِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ (عليه السلام) قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ (صلى الله عليه وآله) أَحَبُّ الصَّحَابَةِ إِلَى اللَّهِ أَرْبَعَةٌ وَ مَا زَادَ قَوْمٌ عَلَى سَبْعَةٍ إِلَّا كَثُرَ لَغَطُهُمْ.

en.hubeali: H 14912 – From him, from Ahmad, from Al-Husayn Bin Sayf, from his brother Ali, from his father, from a man from the Clan of Nowfal Bin Abdul Muttalib who said:
Abu Ja’far Muhammad Bin Aliasws said: ‘The Rasool Allahsaww said: ‘The most beloved company to Allahazwj is four (in number), and a group does not exceed seven except the frequency of the noise’.
en.sarwar: 465. A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from his father, from the one whom he mentioned: Abu Al-Hassan Musa (a.s.) has narrated from his (a.s.) father (a.s.), from his (a.s.) grandfather (a.s.) regarding the will of the Rasool Allah (saww) to Ali (a.s.): ‘Do not go out alone on a journey for the Satan (la) would be with the loner, and he (la) is (also) with the two but further away. O Ali (a.s.)! If the man travels alone he is misguided, and two are (also) misguided, and the three is a group’. He (the narrator) said, ‘And some of them are reporting: ‘For travelling’.
